generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PhysicalChassisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis actuator handling steering and speed control via motor voltage commands (Vedder Electronic Speed Controller)"
]

instance UpperLevelChassisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano executing ACC control logic (ISO 15622) and sending actuation commands"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing raw point cloud data for object detection and tracking in vehicle's proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera capturing ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and surrounding object tracks via depth sensing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance OnboardEgoVehicleSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors implicitly providing ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects (object tracks) updated every perception cycle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

// C4: Data transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, OnboardEgoVehicleSensors
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, OnboardEgoVehicleSensors
]

// C5: Data storage and processing
instance DBSCANClusteringData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data processed via DBSCAN clustering for accurate object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomDataTranslationFE
]

instance KalmanFilteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data filtered via Kalman filtering for improved state estimation accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomDataTranslationFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTrackStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object track state data (position, velocity) for ACC decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

// C10: Models
instance Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the autonomous vehicle for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
]

instance EgoVehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State model representing ego vehicle speed and steering angle derived from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State model representing detected objects (position, velocity) from LiDAR/depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC logic implementation (ISO 15622) computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControllingFE
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication and software package management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, ControllingFE, Custom3DVisualizationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for compute-intensive tasks (ACC control logic execution)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControllingFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware abstraction and real-time execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance Python38Environment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE
]

instance CPlusPlusEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ environment for ROS2 node lifecycle implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControllingFE, Custom3DVisualizationFE
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering/tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringData, KalmanFilteredData
]

instance CustomDataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Frontend implementing ISO 23247 for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, LiDARPointCloudData, EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance Custom3DVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom 3D Visualization Frontend for real-time rendering of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:enables Vehicle3DCADModel, ObjectTrackModel, VehicleStateData
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection Frontend for collecting raw sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Frontend for processing and formatting data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance ControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controlling Frontend implementing ACC logic (ISO 15622)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths for situational awareness"
    DTDFVocab:provides SituationalAwarenessInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECUs to DT Entity using cloud/edge resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC remotely via control panel (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SituationalAwarenessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indirect insights for decision-making through real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic optimization of ACC control logic execution via DT Entity's compute resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual control of ACC system parameters (enable/disable, speed setting, emergency braking) via DT UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting and troubleshooting"
]

// C12: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalChassisActuator, UpperLevelChassisActuator, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, OnboardEgoVehicleSensors
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, Python38Environment, CPlusPlusEnvironment,
    MATLABSimulinkEnvironment, CustomDataTranslationFE, Custom3DVisualizationFE, SQLDatabase
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **ACC control commands**: The DT computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and sends actuation commands (motor voltage) to the physical twin via the **Actuation FE** (ROS2 nodes). The **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** executes these commands to adjust vehicle speed.
  - **Remote management commands**: Users can enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking via the **Control Panel** (User Interface FE), which sends commands over Wi-Fi to the DT Entity for forwarding to the physical twin.
  - **Synchronization**: Clock synchronization between devices is required with **≤100 ms accuracy** to coordinate events and ensure data integrity in distributed systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in real-time with strict timing constraints. Data collection and processing occur at a latency of ≤100 ms, as specified by 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication. Clock synchronization ensures a 100 ms accuracy for distributed systems, enabling reliable event ordering and coordination between the physical twin and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (ISO 23247 RA):
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensors (LiDAR, camera), pre-processing (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering), and actuation (motor voltage commands).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object tracks, ego state), control logic (ACC), and reporting (SQL databases).
  - **User Entity**: Provides interfaces via **3D Visualization** (User Interface FE) and **Control Panel** (User Interface FE) for monitoring and remote management.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (ROS2/Wi-Fi). The **Physical Twin Entity** is a custom addition to the standard, reflecting automotive-specific requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across two primary lifecycle stages: 1) **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC system development, validation, and compliance testing with ISO 15622 standards. 2) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and troubleshooting during vehicle operation. The system does not explicitly cover manufacturing or predictive maintenance phases for this specific ACC-DT case study, though related work in automotive DTs includes these broader applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Real-time latency (<100 ms) and clock synchronization (<100 ms) are validated via hardware/software testing.
  - **Validation**: ACC control logic adheres to ISO 15622 (performance class I) and is tested on the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle.
  - **Uncertainty**: Object tracks and ego state are derived from sensor fusion (LiDAR + depth camera) with DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering to mitigate noise.
  - **Data Integrity**: The Data Translation FE ensures consistent message formats and unit conversions between entities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (e.g., between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity).
    - **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (e.g., between DT Entity and User Entity).
  - **Network Architecture**: Point-to-point connections with **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Data Synchronization**: NTP or similar mechanisms ensure clock accuracy (<100 ms) across devices."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed in a hybrid architecture: 1) **Onboard Components**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (Digital Twin Entity) and Jetson NX (Physical Twin Entity) handle real-time processing and sensor fusion. 2) **External Storage**: Ego vehicle state data (speed, steering, object tracks) is stored on external devices due to limited onboard storage. 3) **Cloud Offloading**: Computation-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic) are offloaded to cloud infrastructure for resource efficiency. The deployment does not specify exact hardware assignments for Digital Twin Entity or Physical Twin Entity beyond their roles in autonomy."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: No explicit mention of integration with other DTs or external information systems (e.g., fleet coordination) in this case study."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (RA) for digital twin development, adapted for automotive use.
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements (performance class I).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (<100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware and software package management."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands can be triggered remotely, but no explicit cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) are described.
  - **Safety-Critical Requirements**: ACC control logic is validated against ISO 15622, and latency (<100 ms) ensures safe operation. The system is **Human-in-the-Loop** (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin) with explicit user interfaces for oversight.
  - **Hardware Safety**: The 1/10th-scale vehicle limits risks, but no mention of fail-safes (e.g., redundant sensors) for full-scale deployment."
]
